title: Scholars @ WCM — Phase 1 Design Decisions
summary: Eight ratified Phase 1 architectural decisions covering API architecture, identity, URLs, departed faculty, refresh failures, DynamoDB ETL, search engine, and render strategy.
notes: Manifest declared ADR with precedence 2; document explicitly states decisions are LOCKED for Phase 1 prototype except decision #1 (API architecture in production) which is preliminary/deferred to Mohammad's design kickoff. All eight decisions ratified 2026-04-29.
